title: Kith app icon - Kin in a solid bubble
style: flat 2D vector app icon, minimal, geometric, high contrast, crisp clean edges, modern private-messenger brand mark; NOT 3D, no gloss, no plastic, no bevel, no texture

composition.tile: one full-bleed rounded-square app-icon tile that fills the entire frame edge to edge, with no outer background and no padding around it
composition.tile_fill: solid ember coral #FF5A2C; at most a barely-perceptible top-to-bottom shade toward #E8481F, otherwise flat
composition.bubble: a single white #FAF7F3 speech bubble centered on the tile: a rounded-rectangle body with soft large corners and one short tail at its lower-left; the whole bubble sits within the central 82 percent of the tile so nothing clips on an icon mask
composition.mark: inside the white bubble, one coral #FF5A2C monogram: a stylized capital letter K made of a single vertical bar on the left plus two diagonal arms that meet the middle of the bar, where each arm ENDS IN A SMALL FILLED ROUND DOT instead of a plain point; even stroke weight, rounded stroke ends, the mark optically centered in the bubble and clearly readable as a K

must: the K-with-two-dots mark must clearly read as the letter K, not scribbles
the bubble tail points down-left and stays fully inside the frame
legible and clean at 44 by 44 pixels
negative_prompt: no 3D, no glossy plastic, no bevel, no emboss, no inner or drop shadow, no outer glow, no bloom, no lens flare, no gradient background, no photorealism, no spelled-out words or extra letters, no numerals, no watermark, no border frame, no keyhole, no padlock, no clutter, no particles

output.usage: Source render for the iOS/Android app icon at 1024x1024. The coral tile is full-bleed and opaque, so iOS needs no background removal.
output.android_adaptive: Use the white bubble plus coral mark as the foreground layer over a solid #FF5A2C background layer.
output.note: The exact mark also exists as clean vector (see the Kith icon board); the vector is the reliable source if a generated render distorts the K-with-dots geometry.
